mapper.select: SELECT CUST.CUST_CD, CUST.CUST_NM, CUST.CUST_ENG_NM ,CUST.COMPANY_TYPE ,CUST.RELAT_YN ,CUST.CORP_TYPE ,CUST.IRS_NUM ,CUST.COMPANY_REG_NUM ,CUST.SCALE_TYPE ,CUST.ZIP_CD AS HQ_ZIP_CD ,CUST.ADDR1 AS HQ_ADDR_1 ,CUST.ADDR2 AS HQ_ADDR_2 ,CUST.CEO_USER_NM AS CEO_USER_NM ,CUST.BUSINESS_TYPE ,CUST.INDUSTRY_TYPE ,(CUST.FOUNDATION_DATE , 'YYYYMMDD') AS FOUNDATION_DATE ,CUST.TEL_NUM AS TEL_NUM ,CUST.FAX_NUM AS FAX_NUM ,CUST.EMAIL AS EMAIL ,CUST.ABOUT_US ,CUST.REMARK ,CUST.E_BILL_ASP_TYPE ,CUST.TAX_ASP_NM ,CUST.TAX_SEND_TYPE ,CUST.CREDIT_AGENCY_NM AS CREDIT_AGENCY_NM ,CUST.CREDIT_CD ,CUST.PROGRESS_CD, GETCODENAME(CUST.GATE_CD, 'M050', CUST.PROGRESS_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PROGRESS_NM ,getUserName(CUST.GATE_CD, CUST.MOD_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS MOD_USER_NM ,(CUST.MOD_DATE , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS MOD_DATE ,CUST.STD_YYYY ,CUST.DATA_REF_CD ,(CUST.TOT_ASSET, 0) AS TOT_ASSET ,(CUST.TOT_FUND, 0) AS TOT_FUND ,(CUST.TOT_SDEPT, 0) AS TOT_SDEPT ,(CUST.RATE_SDEPT, 0) AS RATE_SDEPT ,(CUST.CURR_ASSET, 0) AS CURR_ASSET ,(CUST.CURR_SDEPT, 0) AS CURR_SDEPT ,(CUST.RATE_CURR, 0) AS RATE_CURR ,(CUST.TOT_SALES, 0) AS TOT_SALES ,(CUST.NET_INCOM, 0) AS NET_INCOM ,CUST.ATTACH_FILE_NUM, getFileName(CUST.GATE_CD, CUST.ATTACH_FILE_NUM) AS ATTACH_FILE_NM ,CUST.ASSET_FILE_NUM, getFileName(CUST.GATE_CD, CUST.ASSET_FILE_NUM) AS ASSET_FILE_NM FROM STOCCUST CUST WHERE CUST.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CUST.CUST_CD = #{ses.companyCd} AND CUST.DEL_FLAG = '0'
SELECT MAX(TMPL_NUM) AS TMPL_NUM FROM STOCATTH WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND BUYER_CD = #{PARAM_BUYER_CD} AND DOC_TYPE = 'D01' AND DEL_FLAG = '0' AND USE_FLAG = '1'

SELECT TD.TMPL_FILE_NM ,TD.VALID_PERIOD ,(SELECT (TS.VALID_START_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') FROM STOCATTS TS WHERE TS.GATE_CD = TD.GATE_CD AND TS.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND TS.DOC_TYPE = TD.DOC_TYPE AND TS.TMPL_NUM = TD.TMPL_NUM AND TS.TMPL_SQ = TD.TMPL_SQ AND TS.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS VALID_START_DATE ,(SELECT (TS.VALID_END_DATE, 'yyyyMMdd') FROM STOCATTS TS WHERE TS.GATE_CD = TD.GATE_CD AND TS.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND TS.DOC_TYPE = TD.DOC_TYPE AND TS.TMPL_NUM = TD.TMPL_NUM AND TS.TMPL_SQ = TD.TMPL_SQ AND TS.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS VALID_END_DATE ,TD.REQUIRED_FLAG ,(SELECT getFileCount(TS.GATE_CD, TS.ATT_FILE_NUM) FROM STOCATTS TS WHERE TS.GATE_CD = TD.GATE_CD AND TS.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND TS.DOC_TYPE = TD.DOC_TYPE AND TS.TMPL_NUM = TD.TMPL_NUM AND TS.TMPL_SQ = TD.TMPL_SQ AND TS.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATT_FILE_CNT ,(SELECT TS.ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCATTS TS WHERE TS.GATE_CD = TD.GATE_CD AND TS.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND TS.DOC_TYPE = TD.DOC_TYPE AND TS.TMPL_NUM = TD.TMPL_NUM AND TS.TMPL_SQ = TD.TMPL_SQ AND TS.DEL_FLAG = '0') AS ATT_FILE_NUM ,TD.TMPL_FILE_NUM ,TD.REMARK ,TD.BUYER_CD ,TD.DOC_TYPE ,TD.TMPL_NUM ,TD.TMPL_SQ FROM STOCATTD TD LEFT OUTER JOIN STOCATTS TS ON (TD.GATE_CD = TS.GATE_CD AND TD.BUYER_CD = TS.BUYER_CD AND TD.DOC_TYPE = TS.DOC_TYPE AND TD.TMPL_NUM = TS.TMPL_NUM AND TD.TMPL_SQ = TS.TMPL_SQ) WHERE TD.TMPL_NUM = #{PARAM_TMPL_NUM} AND TD.BUYER_CD = #{PARAM_BUYER_CD} AND TD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND TD.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND TD.USE_FLAG = '1' ORDER BY TD.SORT_SQ
mapper.insert: MERGE STOCATTS ATTS USING (SELECT #{ses.gateCd} AS GATE_CD ,#{CUST_CD} AS BUYER_CD ,#{DOC_TYPE} AS DOC_TYPE ,#{TMPL_NUM} AS TMPL_NUM ,#{TMPL_SQ} AS TMPL_SQ ,#{DOC_NUM} AS DOC_NUM ,#{DOC_CNT} AS DOC_CNT ,#{VENDOR_CD} AS VENDOR_CD ) B ON (ATTS.GATE_CD = B.GATE_CD AND ATTS.BUYER_CD = B.BUYER_CD AND ATTS.DOC_TYPE = B.DOC_TYPE AND ATTS.TMPL_NUM = B.TMPL_NUM AND ATTS.TMPL_SQ = B.TMPL_SQ AND ATTS.DOC_NUM = B.DOC_NUM AND ATTS.DOC_CNT = B.DOC_CNT AND ATTS.VENDOR_CD = B.VENDOR_CD) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET MOD_USER_ID = #{ses.userId} , MOD_DATE = SYSDATE , VALID_START_DATE = (#{VALID_START_DATE}, 'yyyyMMdd') , VALID_END_DATE = (#{VALID_END_DATE}, 'yyyyMMdd') , ATT_FILE_NUM = #{ATT_FILE_NUM} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , DOC_TYPE , TMPL_NUM , TMPL_SQ , DOC_NUM , DOC_CNT , VENDOR_CD , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , VALID_START_DATE , VALID_END_DATE , ATT_FILE_NUM ) VALUES ( #{ses.gateCd} , #{CUST_CD} , #{DOC_TYPE} , #{TMPL_NUM} , #{TMPL_SQ} , #{DOC_NUM} , #{DOC_CNT} , #{VENDOR_CD} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , '0' , (#{VALID_START_DATE}, 'yyyyMMdd') , (#{VALID_END_DATE}, 'yyyyMMdd') , #{ATT_FILE_NUM} )
mapper.select: SELECT CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO ,CUST.CORP_TYPE AS NH_CORP_CODE ,CUST.CUST_NM AS CORP_NM ,CUST.CEO_USER_NM AS REP_NM ,CUST.BUSINESS_TYPE AS BIZTP ,CUST.INDUSTRY_TYPE AS BZC ,CUST.ZIP_CD AS ZIP ,CUST.ADDR1 AS ADDR ,CUST.ADDR2 AS DTL_ADDR ,CUST.TEL_NUM AS REP_TEL ,CUST.FAX_NUM AS FAX ,CUST.COMPANY_REG_NUM AS CORP_ROW_NO ,(CASE WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = '1' THEN '02' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = '2' THEN '03' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = '3' THEN '04' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = '5' THEN '06' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = 'A' THEN '08' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = 'B' THEN '09' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = 'C' THEN '10' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = 'D' THEN '11' ELSE '' END) AS NC_COMP_DS_C ,'01' AS STSC ,'NHEPRO' AS AGENT_ID ,0 AS PPAY_BAC ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS IN_DT FROM STOCCUST CUST WHERE CUST.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CUST.CUST_CD = #{CUST_CD}
SELECT RELAT_YN FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND CUST_CD = #{ses.companyCd}

SELECT DISTINCT OGDP.DEPT_NM AS BRC_BRNM ,OGDP.DEPT_NM AS DEPT_DEPT_NM ,CUST.IRS_NUM AS CORP_NO ,OGDP.DEPT_CD AS BRC ,OGDP.PARENT_DEPT_CD AS UP_DEPT_C ,(CASE WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = '1' THEN '02' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = '2' THEN '03' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = '3' THEN '04' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = '5' THEN '06' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = 'A' THEN '08' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = 'B' THEN '09' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = 'C' THEN '10' WHEN CUST.CORP_TYPE = 'D' THEN '11' ELSE '' END) AS NC_COMP_DS_C ,OGDP.ADDR1 ' ' OGDP.ADDR2 AS ADDR ,OGDP.ZIP_CD AS ZIP ,OGDP.TEL_NUM AS REP_TEL ,OGDP.FAX_NUM AS FAX ,CUST.CORP_TYPE AS NH_CORP_CODE ,'1' AS STSC ,99999999 AS SQNO ,'NHEPRO' AS AGENT_ID ,SYSDATE AS FSRGDTM ,#{ses.userId} AS FSRGID ,SYSDATE AS LSCHGDTM ,#{ses.userId} AS LSCHGID FROM STOCOGDP OGDP LEFT JOIN STOCCUST CUST ON (OGDP.GATE_CD = CUST.GATE_CD AND OGDP.BUYER_CD = CUST.CUST_CD) WHERE OGDP.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND OGDP.BUYER_CD = #{CUST_CD} AND OGDP.DEPT_CD = #{DEPT_CD} AND OGDP.DEL_FLAG = '0' AND CUST.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT OGDA.BANK_NM ,OGDA.BANK_BRANCH_OFFICE ,OGDA.BANK_ACCT_NUM AS BANK_ACCT_NUM ,OGDA.ACCT_HOLDER_NM AS ACCT_HOLDER_NM ,OGDA.ACCT_NICKNAME ,OGDA.ATTACH_FILE_NUM ,GETFILECOUNT(OGDA.GATE_CD, OGDA.ATTACH_FILE_NUM) AS ATTACH_FILE_CNT ,OGDA.USE_FLAG ,OGDA.ACCOUNT_SQ ,OGDA.BUYER_CD ,OGDA.DEPT_CD FROM STOCOGDA OGDA WHERE OGDA.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND OGDA.BUYER_CD = #{CUST_CD} AND OGDA.DEPT_CD = #{DEPT_CD} AND OGDA.DEL_FLAG = '0'
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(OGDA.ACCOUNT_SQ)
ORDER BY convert(numeric, OGDA.ACCOUNT_SQ)
